lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Aye? Who's that, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Marten.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, straight to the point.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: I got betta' things to do than waste my time talkin' to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're rather rude aren't you?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Fine, wanna know more 'bout canoes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, not from you at least.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Then get out of here and stop botherin' me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you teach me about canoes?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Hahaha! Sorry mate, you'll not be able to make any canoes outta that tree there. You'll need to get a bit more skilled at the craft of Woodcuttin'.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: But once you get a bit betta', you'll be able to make a canoe and ride the river.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: It's not 'ard mate, you just gotta chop that tree o'er there down.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Then cut it down into a canoe. So simple a gobbo could do it.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: But you got no chance of turning it into a beautiful canoe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why's that?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: I can tell by lookin' at ya! You ain't a woodcutter, most you'd be able to do is sail to the next stop on a log.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Hmm, s'pose you could make a decent canoe with your skills. you'll be able to make a dugout, I reckons.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How far will I be able to go in a dugout canoe?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Err, probably about two stops before it sinks on ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could that take me back to Lumbridge?

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Pah, I don't think so. You'll be lucky to make it past Varrock.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: Well bless me axe, you're almost as good a woodchopper as meself! You'll have no issue craftin' the best of the best, the waka canoe.

lines.speaker: Marten
lines.text: One of those beauties can take you up further in the Wilderness. Beautiful place that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thank you.
